heroSummary: BSc Computer Security and Digital Forensics student seeking internship/attachment roles in cybersecurity, SOC operations, networking, and IT support.
about: I am a Computer Security and Digital Forensics undergraduate at JOOUST who pairs campus governance, technical writing, and community building with hands-on cybersecurity practice. In addition to representing SIIS students in Congress, I lead technical publications for JOOUST ISACA, captain CTFZone Labs activities, and mentor peers through SOC labs, TryHackMe/Xicrosoft challenges, and Hackathon build sessions. That blend of leadership, communication, and SOC/CTF experience informs how I approach attachments in SOC, network security, or penetration testing roles.
